Notes: Targets delete_name at the zone apex, where SOA and NS are mandatory, to observe whether servers reject the UPDATE or partially apply it.

Steps.Description: Delete the zone apex name campus.edu. with delete_name, without prerequisites, leaving the fate of mandatory SOA/NS data underspecified.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA remains present after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex NS remains present after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the non-mandatory apex TXT survives or is deleted.
